commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the ACP reply projector so `final_only` mode keeps visible text buffered across intermediate tool-use `done` events and adds a regression test for pre-tool plus post-tool text delivery.

Reproducibility: yes. for the retargeted ACP-only behavior from source: current `main` flushes and resets the projector on any `done`, while the PR proof shows buffered text surviving a tool-use boundary until terminal completion.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the previous PR-scope blocker was addressed and the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review and checks.
